description: This is the interface description of @API.
title: API Document

@API.element.description: Specifies the release state of an element which is part of an API.

successor.description: Defines the name of a released successor element/association which replaces an element/association with release state #DEPRECATED or #DECOMMISSIONED.

decommissioningPlannedForYearMonth.description: The annotation describes the planned decommissioning date of the annotated element. Use ISO format for YearMonth: YYYY-MM (e.g. 2024-08)

@API.element.title: @API.element

@API.element.releaseState.description: The annotation describes the release state of the annotated element.

#.description: Provide the value in `{ "#": "<value>" }` enum notation.

oneOf.description:
Formerly released element/association is not to be used anymore.
At runtime, the element/association must work as before.
Together with this value a successors of the element/association should be defined using annotation @API.element.successor.

Formerly released element/association not to be used anymore.
At runtime, the element/association returns null values.
Together with this value a successors of the element/association should be defined using annotation @API.element.successor.

@API.element.releaseState.title: @API.element.releaseState
